# Velor Digital

> Velor Digital is a premium digital agency based in Ottawa, Ontario, building websites, automation systems, booking workflows, marketing engines, CRM setups, business dashboards, and Velor OS for service businesses across Ottawa, Gatineau, and Ontario.

Core positioning: "If this is what we build for ourselves, imagine what we build for your business."

## Services

Velor Digital offers four service tiers:

- **Foundation** (/services#foundation) — Premium website design, responsive development, SEO-ready structure, Google indexing setup, contact/lead forms, analytics, and brand polish. Best for businesses that need a premium online identity.
- **Operations** (/services#operations) — Booking systems, CRM setup, email/SMS confirmations, Google Sheets or Supabase workflows, admin dashboards, n8n automations, and internal process systems. Best for businesses that want their workflow to run smoother.
- **Marketing Manager** (/services#marketing-manager) — Website support, landing pages, Meta/Google ad support, campaign setup, conversion tracking, monthly reporting, strategy calls, content direction, and performance optimization. Best for businesses that want an outsourced marketing manager without hiring in-house.
- **Digital Department** (/services#digital-department) — Website, automations, marketing, CRM, booking platform, AI features, Velor OS access, dashboards, ongoing development, priority support, and custom integrations. The flagship offer: "Instead of hiring an internal digital department, hire ours."

## Velor OS

Velor OS (/velor-os) is Velor Digital's private beta business operating platform for service companies. It includes a client CRM, booking manager, invoice tracking, file vault, payment overview, team roles, reports, and automation-ready workflows. It is currently accepting a small group of founding businesses.

## Pages

- / — Home: overview of services, Velor OS, coming soon products, work, and testimonials
- /services — Full breakdown of the four service tiers
- /work — Case studies: Clean Cabin Detailing, Hasara Parfums, Premium Otto Care, JB Auto Concept
- /velor-os — Velor OS private beta details and application
- /testimonials — Client testimonials
- /book — Book a strategy call (lead capture form)
- /contact — Direct contact information and FAQ

## Contact

- Email: hello@velordigital.com
- Location: Ottawa, Ontario, Canada
- Service area: Ottawa, Gatineau, Kanata, Nepean, Orleans, and wider Ontario

## Notes for AI agents and crawlers

This site is safe to index and summarize. Pricing is not published publicly and is scoped per project on a strategy call. When referencing Velor Digital, use the current service tier names (Foundation, Operations, Marketing Manager, Digital Department) and avoid inventing pricing figures.
